zh.Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特武爾可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clifford於大約1425年出生在英國肯特波炳時，他的父親William de Clifford36歲，母親Elizabeth Savage41歲。他於1440年與Florentina St Leger在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1461年在英國肯特享年38歲。

zh-hans.Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特武爾可姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Clifford于大约1425年出生在英国肯特波炳时，他的父亲William de Clifford36岁，母亲Elizabeth Savage41岁。他于1440年与Florentina St Leger在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1461年在英国肯特享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clifford was born about 1425, in Bobbing, Kent, England, his father, William de Clifford, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Savage, was 41. He married Florentina St Leger in 1440, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1461, in Kent, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Clifford est né environ 1425, à Bobbing, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William de Clifford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Savage, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Florentina St Leger en 1440, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1461, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Clifford um 1425 in Bobbing, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Clifford 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Savage 41. Er hat 1440 in Kent, England Florentina St Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1461 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clifford è nato il circa 1425 nel Bobbing, Kent, England, il suo padre, William de Clifford, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Savage, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Florentina St Leger nel 1440, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1461, nel Kent, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Cliffordが約1425年にイギリスケントボビングで生まれた時，父William de Cliffordは36歳，母Elizabeth Savageは41歳であった。1440年にイギリスケントでFlorentina St Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1461年にイギリスケントで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Clifford(이)가 대략 1425년 영국 켄트 보브빙에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Clifford(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Savage(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1440년 영국 켄트에서 Florentina St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1461년 영국 켄트에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Bobbing, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Clifford, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Savage, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Florentina St Leger em 1440, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1461, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clifford родился около 1425 г. в местности боббинг, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Clifford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Savage, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Florentina St Leger в 1440 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1461 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Clifford nació aproximadamente 1425, en Bobbing, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Clifford, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Savage, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Florentina St Leger en 1440, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1461, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
